claim: Evaluation frameworks like Braintrust provide standardized metrics and benchmarking tools to systematically measure AI model quality and catch regressions in production.
actionable: Use Braintrust or similar eval frameworks to define baseline metrics for your AI system and run automated regressions before deployment.

claim: Custom evaluation metrics tailored to business outcomes (e.g., user satisfaction, task success) are more meaningful than generic quality scores.
actionable: Define evaluation metrics aligned with actual business goals, not generic model quality metrics, to accurately assess system fitness.
